name: tree-ring-memory
description: Lifecycle-aware local memory guidance for Codex agents using Tree Ring Memory.

interface.shortDescription: Local-first memory lifecycle guidance for Codex agents.
interface.longDescription: Tree Ring Memory gives Codex a lifecycle-aware memory practice for project recall, durable decisions, evidence-backed lessons, explicit forgetting, and privacy-safe memory capture using the open-source Tree Ring Memory CLI.
defaultPrompt: Use Tree Ring Memory to recall durable project context before editing.
Use Tree Ring Memory to capture this validated lesson without storing a transcript.
Use Tree Ring Memory to audit stale or sensitive memory before closeout.
